caption:
Ready to unlock your leadership potential? 🌟

REX (Rakan Exco) is part of the SRC family, giving you the chance to actively organize events, execute programs, and enhance campus life. It’s the perfect platform to gain real-world skills, boost your confidence, and meet an amazing community of aspiring leaders.

Press play to learn more about what REX can do for you, and don’t forget to scan the qr to apply! 📲

CALL FOR PROPOSAL: CONVOFEST 2026✨

Think your team has what it takes to organise the biggest festival on campus? 

Submit your team proposal now and stand a chance to become the Official ConvoFest 2026 Organising Team! 

Submission Deadline: 31 May 2026
Pitching Session: 30 June 2026 (Estimated)

Scan the QR code on the poster to apply.

Queries: style@mmu.edu.my

#ConvoFest2026 #MMU

💰 FINANCE GUIDELINE: VIEWING YOUR FINANCIAL INFORMATION 📊

Dear Students, 

Ever wondered how to check your fees, invoices, and payment history on CLiC? We've got you covered! Swipe through our step-by-step guide! 👉

Here's what you can do in Campus Finances 👇
📋 Summary — View your outstanding balance & due amounts
📁 Account Activity — See all your financial transactions & print them
🧾 Invoices — View & print your invoices
⚠️ Miscellaneous — Check supplementary paper & summons charges
💳 Payments — View payment records & print receipts
🔄 Refunds — Track your refund transactions
📄 Statement of Account — View & print your current year's statement

🔑 How to access:
CLiC → Student Homepage → Campus Finances

⚠️ Note: The total outstanding balance may differ from your invoice balance as it includes charges, adjustments, and upfront payments.

Save this post for future reference! 🔖

Best Regards,
Students' Representative Council, Student Academic & Entrepreneurship Division 2025/2026

Dear Students,
 
As you are aware, earning Cadetship Points is a mandatory graduation requirement for undergraduate students admitted from Term 2510 onwards. Hence, we are inviting all undergraduate students from the 2510 admit terms onwards to attend a briefing on Cadetship.
 
This briefing will explain the eligibility, categories of activity and point requirements for graduation. Furthermore, you can raise your doubt during the Q&A session.
 
The MS Teams online briefing details are as follows. Please select a time that suits you:

1)   6 May 2026 (Wednesday)
2:00 p.m. – 3:00 p.m. : MS Team (link at comment)
 
2)   7 May 2026 (Thursday)
4:00 p.m. – 5:00 p.m. : MS Team (link at comment)
 
3)   8 May 2026 (Friday)
11:00 a.m. – 12:00 p.m. : MS Team (link at comment)
 
For further information please contact cadet@mmu.edu.my

Hey everyone!

We’re currently testing a new real-time bus tracking system to improve your daily commite

• Try it here: https://kasheng.me/

This system will be under testing until 13th May, and the Telegram live location will continue as usual during this period.

We’re actively gathering feedback via the form in the caption,
so after using it, please let us know if there are any bugs or issues and any suggestions for improvement via the QR code.

Your feedback will help us refine the system before full rollout. Thanks for helping us improve this!

Best Regards,
Students’ Representative Council 2025 / 2026

Happy Mother's Day 💖

Dear Students,

Happy Mother’s Day to all the wonderful mothers who give so much of themselves every single day.

Watching your love🩷, care👩‍👦, and dedication to your family is truly inspiring. 

Mothers are the heart of every home, bringing comfort, strength, and warmth into the lives of everyone around them. 

Today is a reminder of how deeply appreciated and loved you are for all the sacrifices and beautiful moments you create. 

Wishing every mom a day filled with happiness, peace, and endless love 💖

Best regards,
Students' Representative Council 
2025/2026

🚨 RECRUITMENT OPEN: STUDENT WELFARE DIVISION 🚨

Want to make a real impact on student life in MMU?
The Student Welfare Division is now recruiting passionate and responsible students to join the team and help improve the welfare, voices, and overall university experience of students 💛

As part of the division, you’ll be involved in:
• Handling student concerns and feedback
• Improving campus welfare initiatives
• Assisting with events and student support
• Working closely with SRC members and management
• Creating actual change within the student community

If you care about students and want to contribute beyond just academics, this is your chance to step up.

Be part of the team that works behind the scenes for the students, with the students. ✊

Best Regards,
Students’ Representative Council 2025/2026

University life is more than just classes, assignments, and trying to survive the semester 🌟

Join the Public Relations Division (PRD) and be part of the team behind the content, creativity, and campus buzz! From managing social media, creating posts, promoting events, to capturing fun moments, you’ll gain real experience while improving your creativity, communication, and teamwork skills 📸✨

Whether you love taking pictures, designing, making content, or simply want to try something new, PRD is a space for you to grow, meet new people, and make your university experience more exciting and meaningful 🤩

It’s the perfect platform for you to enhance your creativity, confidence, leadership, communication, and teamwork skills while meeting an amazing community of people who share the same interests as you.”📸

👉 Scan the QR to apply now!

🚨 IMPORTANT SHUTTLE BUS UPDATE 🚨

Major changes to the MMU shuttle bus system will officially take effect starting 11 May 2026, including revised schedules, route adjustments, extended operating hours, Student ID enforcement, and the introduction of a real-time bus tracking system.

Best Regards,
Students’ Representative Council 2025/2026

caption:
Happy Labour Day! ⚙️✨

Dear MMU Community,
Today, we celebrate all the amazing individuals who make our MMU community so vibrant and strong. To our dedicated lecturers, hardworking campus staff, and driven students. Thank you for your continuous hard work, creativity, and the unique energy you bring to campus every single day.
Whether you're teaching in the lecture halls, working behind the scenes to keep the university running, or studying for your future, we appreciate you. Wishing you a well-deserved break and a wonderful Labour Day! 💪 

Best regards,
Students' Representative Council

Your university experience is exactly what you make it. Make yours count with SAED REX! 💼✨

We’re on the lookout for proactive students who want hands-on experience in student affairs and enterprise development. As part of our team, you’ll be directly involved in managing academic advocacy, solving real campus challenges, and sparking new business ideas among students.

Stop waiting for opportunities, create them with us. 🤝

👉 Scan the qr to apply today!

CSMD & SAED successfully conducted a meaningful and engaging Meet & Greet session with the Faculty of Applied Communication (FAC).

The session served as a valuable platform for open discussions, idea exchange, and strengthening collaboration between the student bodies and the faculty. Insightful conversations were held regarding future initiatives, student development, communication strategies, and opportunities for stronger engagement within the faculty community.

We sincerely appreciate the time, support, and warm welcome from the FAC team. Looking forward to building stronger connections and creating more impactful initiatives together.

Best Regards, 
Student Representative Council 2025/2026

#CSMD #SAED #SRC #MMU #FAC StudentLeadership Collaboration MeetAndGreet

University life is more than just classes and assignments..it’s about the experiences, people, and memories you create along the way. 📚✨💫

Join the Clubs and Societies Management Division (CSMD) and be part of the team that brings campus life together! From working with student clubs, organizing activities, managing events, and helping new ideas grow, you’ll gain real experience while building your confidence, leadership, and communication skills. 

Whether you want to improve your teamwork, meet new people, or step out of your comfort zone, CSMD gives you the chance to grow while making your university journey more exciting and meaningful. 

🪄Start creating opportunities instead of waiting for them. Your university experience starts here with CSMD!🌟

📌Scan the QR to apply now!
